Co-founder ‌Shalev Hulio, who cut ties with NSO in 2022 after the company was accused by Meta of ​targeting WhatsApp and its users, went on to launch Dream in 2023.  Hulio co-founded NSO in 2010 and previously served as its CEO.

items.title: Oligo Security Joins Palantir's FedStart Program to Accelerate Runtime Security for Federal Agencies
items.summary: TEL AVIV, Israel, June 18, 2026--Oligo Security, the runtime security company, today announced it has joined Palantir Technologies' (Nasdaq: PLTR) FedStart program. Through the collaboration, Oligo will accelerate its path toward FedRAMP High and DoD Impact Level 5 (IL5) compliance, enabling government agencies to unify real-time protection across applications, cloud workloads, and AI systems.
